case_title: DOUGLAS PARKING LLC VS. MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,978.80 FILED BY MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DOUGLAS PARKING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DOUGLAS PARKING LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC $4,811.62 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,876.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
